evidence_excerpt: Postoperative course was uneventful; at last follow-up 12 months after diagnosis, there was no clinical or radiologic evidence of recurrent disease and no adjuvant therapy was given.

quality_of_life.evidence_excerpt: At 12 months after diagnosis, there was no clinical evidence of disease or recurrence, implying no ongoing symptoms.

timeline_events.evidence_excerpt: The patient’s postoperative course was uneventful.
At the time of her last follow-up, 12 months after diagnosis, the patient has no clinical or radiologic evidence of recurrent disease.

notes_on_uncertainty: The precise index time (diagnosis prior to treatment) is not explicitly stated; the pathology-confirmed diagnosis around the time of initial surgery was used as the reference. Long-term follow-up is reported only to 12 months, which is at the threshold of the long_term category. Functional status is inferred from the absence of complications and disease; explicit activity descriptions are not provided.
